## What & why

What does this change, and why?

## How it was verified

- [ ] `uv run python scripts/verify.py`
- [ ] Relevant `ab_tests/` suite(s) run and green
- [ ] Manually checked the affected page / endpoint

## Notes

- [ ] Docs/tests updated alongside the code
- [ ] No secrets or user data committed
- [ ] Follows the conventions in CONTRIBUTING.md (English, isolated clients, idempotent SQL)
